division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: The registration of a foreign trailer coach owned by a nonresident shall be subject to and governed by Section 6700.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 10. Registration of Trailer Coaches [5350 - 5354]
##### § 5354

The registration of a foreign trailer coach owned by a nonresident shall be subject to and governed by Section 6700.

*(Amended by Stats. 1959, Ch. 1021.)*

subsections.text: The registration of a foreign trailer coach owned by a nonresident shall be subject to and governed by Section 6700.
